#  Manually Create Specification Sections 
##  Things to Consider 
  * [Required User Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-project/permissions)
  * Procore automatically divides your specifications into individual divisions and specification sections using OCR technology. See [Upload Specifications](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-project/tutorials/upload-specifications).
  * You are able to manually create spec sections, but you cannot upload a PDF to the spec section. To create spec sections linked to specification PDFs, see [Upload Specifications](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-project/tutorials/upload-specifications).


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the project's **Specifications** tool.
  2. Click **+Create Specification**.
  3. Select a **division** for the new specification from the drop down menu.
  4. Enter a **number** for the new specification.  
_Note:_ You cannot use a number that is currently associated with another specification.
  5. Enter a **description** for the new specification.
  6. Click **Create**.  
Note: The ***** marked sections are the required fields.


## See Also
  * [Where do the selections in the 'Specification Section' drop-down list come from?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-where-do-the-selections-in-the-spec-sections-drop-down-list-come-from)
  * [Configure Advanced Settings: Specifications](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-project/tutorials/configure-advanced-settings-specifications)
  * [Review and Publish Specifications](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-project/tutorials/review-and-publish-specifications)
title: Manually Create Specification Sections
description: How to create a new spec section in the Specifications tool.
